log.context:
Here's the full picture:

**Root cause:** georgelarson.me is behind Cloudflare's proxy (resolves to 172.67.211.104 / 104.21.85.213). Cloudflare only proxies HTTP/HTTPS traffic — raw TCP connections on IRC ports (6667, 6697, 6668, 1337) are all blocked at Cloudflare's edge, hence "Connection refused."

**What's actually open:**
- Port 443 and 8443 — HTTPS (403 from Cloudflare, origin access blocked)
- Port 8080 — ECONNREFUSED (not reachable through proxy)

**No IRC port is reachable through georg...(truncated)
